channel.title: Blog on Crumbliacci's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Crumbliacci's Blog

item.title: Breakdown of an Ongoing macOS Infostealer Campaign
item.description: I’ve seen a couple of companies hit by a macOS infostealer through February/March 2026. Here are my notes on how it behaves, how it’s distributed, and some IOCs.

item.title: TYT TH-UV88 Hacks: Unlock Transmit Frequencies and Factory Tools
item.description: The TYT TH-UV88 is the cheapest commercial radio you can buy in Canada – but only if you have the right tools. Let’s walk through some bad code and figure out how this $50 radio is configured.
